query:
UPDATE jobs SET
               attempts = attempts + 1,
               last_error = $3,
               run_at = CASE
                   WHEN attempts + 1 >= max_attempts THEN 'infinity'::timestamptz
                   ELSE now() + make_interval(secs => 5.0 * (attempts + 1))
               END
         WHERE environment_id = $1 AND id = $2
